relics.description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Winged Boots
relics.description: You may ignore paths when choosing the next rooms to travel to [blue]2[/blue] times.

relics.name: Mummified Hand
relics.description: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play that turn.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.name: Lizard Tail
relics.description: When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue], heal to [green]50%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).

relics.name: Candelabra
relics.description: At the start of your [blue]2nd[/blue] turn, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Archaic Tooth
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]Neutralize[/gold] into [gold]Suppress[/gold].

relics.name: Bread
relics.description: At the start of your first turn, lose [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img]. At the start of all other turns, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: The Chosen Cheese
relics.description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

relics.name: Venerable Tea Set
relics.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], start the next combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img].

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random Attacks.

relics.name: Signet Ring
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]999[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

relics.name: Tungsten Rod

relics.name: Rainbow Ring
relics.description: The first time you play an Attack, Skill, and Power each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.

glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.

glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.

glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.
